auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Kickbox API key passed with the apikey query parameter. Find it on the account keys settings page: https://app.kickbox.com/accounts/<accountId>/settings/keys

actions.name: check_disposable_email
actions.description: Check whether an email address or domain belongs to a disposable email provider.

domain_or_email.description: The email address or domain to check for disposable-email status.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for checking whether an email or domain is disposable.

disposable.description: Whether the input email address or domain belongs to a disposable provider.

outputSchema.description: The disposable-email lookup result returned by Kickbox.

actions.name: verify_email
actions.description: Verify whether a single email address is deliverable and retrieve Kickbox risk signals.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for verifying a single email address with Kickbox.

result.description: The overall verification result returned by Kickbox.

reason.description: The provider reason that explains the verification result.

role.description: Whether the address is role-based, such as support@ or admin@.

free.description: Whether the address belongs to a free email provider.

disposable.description: Whether the address belongs to a disposable email provider.

accept_all.description: Whether the domain appears to accept all inbound email addresses.

sendex.description: Kickbox Sendex quality score between 0 and 1.

email.description: The normalized email address evaluated by Kickbox.

success.description: Whether Kickbox completed the verification request successfully.

user.description: The local part of the verified email address.

domain.description: The domain part of the verified email address.

did_you_mean.description: Suggested corrected email address when Kickbox detects a likely typo.

outputSchema.description: The single-email verification result returned by Kickbox.
